title: othocallis kurdistanica
intro: Othocallis kurdistanica is a flowering plant species in the family Iridaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Iraq. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Othocallis kurdistanica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
